summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Recursive Reasoning Framework. Backend APIs, WebSocket real-time communication, and frontend UI components all functioning correctly. Successfully tested the complete reasoning flow with live updates and correct color coding.

integration_issues.issue: Session metrics may not fully load when switching between previous sessions

passed_tests: Frontend loads with Swiss High-Contrast design
Query input field accepts text input
Submit button creates new reasoning session
WebSocket connects successfully for real-time updates
Live reasoning steps display with correct color coding (blue=decomposition, amber=reflection)
Metrics update in real-time (tokens, latency, depth, confidence)
Tree visualization shows reasoning flow using ReactFlow
Clicking session history loads previous session correctly
